data<br>robot teleop · manipulation · AV logs<br><i>→ corpus on FSx for Lustre / S3</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="280" x="350" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="generate" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>2 · Generate (SDG)</b><br>Cosmos3-Super
